## Frontend Governance Checklist

> Complete this section for any PR that proposes, modifies, or reviews frontend/UI behavior.

- [ ] I reviewed FRONTEND_ARCHITECTURE_RULES.md
- [ ] I reviewed RTL_I18N_REQUIREMENTS.md
- [ ] I reviewed UI_TEMPLATE_SELECTION_RULES.md
- [ ] I attached compliance evidence for Angular architecture
- [ ] I attached compliance evidence for Arabic/English support
- [ ] I attached compliance evidence for RTL/LTR behavior
- [ ] I confirmed no prohibited framework/template usage
- [ ] I confirmed licensing compliance
- [ ] I documented any gap or exception
